Ntc Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is denied, without prejudice. Cach, LLC has not filed a memorandum of points and authorities or proof of service. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
